title: Soup Pack
description: Basic mod pack for the TMC Server. Not Required to play but enhances the armor stand customization, render distance, sounds, and gives more technical info.
body:
## Want to get the full experience on the TMC Server?


### This mod pack adds only FIVE core mods:

**Armor Poser**: As simple as the name, allows you to customize armor stands and change their poses, size, direction, gravity, and more!

**Audio Player**: Lets you repurpose music discs, goat horns, and mob heads for new sounds!

**Flashback**: A replay-editing mod that allows you to make cinematic clips of your builds

**MiniHud**: A "mini F3" HUD mod, also with various overlays like light level, spawn chunks, slime chunks etc.

**Simple Voice Chat**: A proximity chat in minecraft! Turn it on to hear your fellow members with the mod. You can also make groups for non-proximity mode for working on collaborative projects.

**Status**: An activity status in minecraft! Press U to toggle a status and let other members know if you are busy/recording or available to chat!
